rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount, while the cited rule mandates school safety equipment. They govern unrelated subjects and neither references the other.
quote: Each school district and open-enrollment charter school must have at least one breaching tool and one ballistic shield available for use at each campus in the event of an active shooter incident.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed tax-code change; no cross-reference or dependency exists.
